pageContextBrowse: Browse and edit the question bank

errors.yamlMustBeObject: Source must be structured content (top level should be a mapping)
errors.selectCollectionFirst: Pick a collection in the filter on the left before exporting
errors.deleteGroup: Delete the whole group “{{id}}”? This cannot be undone.
errors.deleteQuestion: Delete question “{{id}}”? This cannot be undone.

title: Question bank
structureHint: Questions are stored under the project bank as
structureHintTail: ; folder names must match the paths configured for the app.
subject: Subject
exportNeedCollection: Open filters and choose a specific collection (not “All”)
exportHintNeedCollection: Choose a collection in the filter before exporting—not “All”.
sharedMaterialPh: Shared stem or instructions; may be empty
importFormats: Single .yaml / .yml file, or a .zip in the same layout as Export above (questions and images are picked up from the bundle layout).
pasteYamlHint: Paste a question list in the same format as export; it will be written to the target collection above.
emptyListHint: Use New question or Import below; files are stored in the project bank folder.
emptyFilterHint: Try another subject, collection, type, or search.
selectLeft: Select a question in the list on the left to review or edit.
editingInModal: Editing in a dialog. Close it to continue here; the preview on the right stays in sync.
previewEmpty: Select a question to preview math and layout.
closeTabConfirm: This tab has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
switchTabDiscard: You have unsaved changes. Switch anyway and discard them?
